subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan and Florence Khan spoken in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: That which is always the cause of inharmony and delays the progress of the Cause of God is love for leadership and self-interest. Those who cherish such tendencies
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @stories; anecdotes, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
